changes.value:
Remove 5 llama-specific fields (batch_size, n_seq_max, n_threads, n_threads_batch, use_hf_params) from model-loader ModelConfig. Create local ModelConfig in llama-agent with all fields. Update all consumers.

Steps:
1. Strip model-loader/src/types.rs ModelConfig
2. Define ModelConfig in llama-agent/src/types/configs.rs
3. Update llama-agent/src/types/mod.rs re-exports
4. Update llama-agent/src/model.rs resolver call
5. Update llama-embedding/src/model.rs
6. Update ane-embedding/src/model.rs
7. Update model-loader tests and examples
8. Verify all builds and tests pass
Refactor ModelConfig: strip llama-specific fields from model-loader
